text: I think it is a good idea.
In my opinion, the plan is good.
Good morning, team. I have an idea. We start the meeting at nine oclock.
I think that is a good idea. Nine oclock is good for me.
In my opinion, we also need a short coffee break.
I agree. A coffee break is good for the team.
Some people want a long meeting. What do you think, Anna?
I dont agree. A short meeting is good. Maybe we can finish at ten.

Good morning, everyone. Welcome to our team meeting. Today we have three things to talk about. First, the new plan for the month. In my opinion, it is a good plan. Second, the coffee break. I think ten minutes is enough. Third, your ideas. Please share your opinion with the team. I want to hear from everyone. Thank you, and let us start.

Today was my first team meeting at the Sao Paulo office. I was a little nervous. But I shared my opinion in English. I said, I think it is a good idea. My colleagues agreed with me. Sometimes I did not agree, and I said, I don't agree. It is okay to disagree in a meeting. Now I feel more confident. I love my new team.

First, Bruno welcomes the team to the meeting. Then he shares his idea about the new plan. Next, Anna gives her opinion and says she agrees. After that, a colleague disagrees about the time. Finally, the team decides together and ends the meeting.
I think it is a good idea.
In my opinion, the plan is good.
Maybe we can start at nine.
